2606.07119.title: The Three-Ring Architecture: Governing Agents in the Era of On-Platform Organisations
2606.07119.paper_summary: The current phase of enterprise AI deployment faces a structural failure: organisations are acquiring agentic capability without the infrastructure to govern it. The result is expected to reproduce the error of the first wave of AI deployment: decentralised intelligence without a federation layer leading to a 95% project failure rate. This paper formalises the Three-Ring Architecture as the governing infrastructure of the on-platform organisation. Ring 1 is the existing production architecture; Ring 2 is the M2 federation layer built on strategies-based agentic AI; Ring 3 is the LLM-based frontier intelligence layer. Ring 2 constitutes, in the technically exact sense, the operating system of the agentic enterprise - performing at the organisational level what a computing OS performs at the device level: resource abstraction, process coordination, permission enforcement, and a stable platform for compounding intelligence. A central contribution is the formal distinction between Ring 2 and Ring 3 risk profiles. Strategies-based agents operate within a deterministic framework: their consequences are traceable, their permissions enforceable, their deviations recoverable. LLM-based agents introduce a categorically distinct risk: a non-deterministic actor whose deviations propagate through complex organisational systems without retrospective traceability. Ring 2 is not a useful addition - it is a necessary condition of control and compliance. A further consequence: every improvement in LLM capability is a structural tailwind for this architecture. More capable non-deterministic actors produce larger consequences when they deviate. The governance requirement scales with capability. The architecture has been validated across a decade of deployment in financial services, government, procurement, and compliance among other sectors.
2606.07119.paper_summary_zh: 當前企業人工智慧部署的階段面臨結構性失敗：組織正在獲得代理能力，但缺乏治理這一能力的基礎設施。其結果預計將重現第一波人工智慧部署的錯誤：缺乏聯邦層的去中心化智慧導致95%的專案失敗率。本文將三環架構正式化為平台內組織的治理基礎設施。第一環是現有的生產架構；第二環是基於策略的代理人工智慧所建立的M2聯邦層；第三環是基於LLM的前沿智慧層。第二環在技術上準確地構成了代理企業的操作系統——在組織層面上執行計算操作系統在設備層面上執行的功能：資源抽象、過程協調、權限執行，以及一個穩定的智慧複合平台。一個核心貢獻是正式區分第二環和第三環的風險概況。基於策略的代理在確定性框架內運作：它們的後果是可追溯的，權限是可執行的，偏差是可恢復的。基於LLM的代理則引入了一種根本不同的風險：一個非確定性的行為者，其偏差通過複雜的組織系統傳播，且無法追溯。第二環不是一個有用的附加部分——它是控制和合規的必要條件。進一步的結果是：每一項LLM能力的提升都是對這一架構的結構性順風。更有能力的非確定性行為者在偏差時會產生更大的後果。治理要求隨著能力的提升而擴大。該架構已在金融服務、政府、採購和合規等多個領域經過十年的部署驗證。
2606.07119.author: Sergio Alvarez-Telena et.al.
